title: sersalisia dugulla
intro: Sersalisia dugulla, also known as the Dilly bean or Dilly bush, is a small tree native to Western Australia and the Northern Territory. The plant has been traditionally used by Indigenous Australians for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Sersalisia dugulla include reducing inflammation and relieving pain, as well as treating wounds and skin conditions. The plant can be used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and creams, often in combination with other native Australian plants, to harness its medicinal properties.
